title: Filing of claim
doc_html:
§1622.  Filing of claim

Claims for benefits shall be made in accordance with the provisions of this Chapter and such regulations as the administrator may prescribe.

Acts 1997, No. 912, §1, eff. July 10, 1997.
doc_text:
§1622.  Filing of claim
Claims for benefits shall be made in accordance with the provisions of this Chapter and such regulations as the administrator may prescribe.
Acts 1997, No. 912, §1, eff. July 10, 1997.
